title: Cuneiform Tablet #0062: Hellenistic Lexical
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Hellenistic period — a lexical document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Hellenistic period — a lexical document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Hellenistic period. Lexical document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records lexical matters typical of Hellenistic period administrative or literary practice.
